hero.desc: We manufacture disability support accessories with full custom fitting. Twenty years of experience, direct service from the owners, quality built one item at a time.

trust.personal_desc: Directly with the owners — no middlemen
trust.custom_desc: We manufacture to your measurements and needs

categories.section_desc: A wide range of support accessories, manufactured in Israel to our high standards
categories.wheelchair_desc: Add-ons and accessories for improved comfort and function
categories.toilet_desc: Chairs adapted for safe and comfortable use
categories.bed_desc: Padding, side guards, and sleep supports
categories.upholstery_desc: Professional upholstery for maximum long-term comfort
categories.cushions_desc: Specialized cushions for pressure distribution and ulcer prevention
categories.custom_desc: We manufacture to your specific measurements, materials, and needs. Ideal for institutions, hospitals, and treating physicians.

about.title: A family business built on trust and quality
about.p1: Nachama and Roman founded the factory in 2006, recognizing that the market lacked local, flexible, and reliable manufacturing solutions for people with special needs.
about.p2: Twenty years later, we still speak directly with every client, still manufacture every product ourselves, and still feel personal responsibility for every item that leaves the factory.

steps.section_title: From need to solution — three steps
steps.section_desc: A simple, human, and clear process from start to finish
steps.step1_desc: Call, send a WhatsApp, or fill in the form. Someone from the team responds personally within one business day.
steps.step2_desc: We discuss your needs, measurements, and product type. If needed, we send a sketch or schedule a meeting.
steps.step3_desc: We manufacture to the agreement and ship nationwide. We stand behind every product that leaves our factory.

contact.title: Speak with us directly
contact.desc: No call center, no waiting. Talk to the owners and get a real answer.
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us briefly what you're looking for...
contact.submit_success: Message sent! We'll be in touch shortly.

catalog.coming_soon: Products coming soon — contact us for details

footer.desc: Israeli manufacturer of disability support accessories since 2006. Ashkelon, Israel.
